Any questions? Check out the FAQs

Do you offer customized headphones in West Palm Beach, FL?
We offer professionally printed headphones in the metro West Palm Beach, Florida area. Customize the SILENCE silent disco headphones with your logo, brand, team name or a unique message that brings your event to life and create a memorable party experience that will be hard to top.

How much do silent headphone rentals cost in West Palm Beach, FL?
Our West Palm Beach silent disco headphone rentals are available to rent at an affordable, upfront price. Our premier silent disco equipment is state-of-the-art with LED headsets and wireless transmitters. Get your quote today!

Do you also sell silent disco headphones?
Our West Palm Beach silent disco headphone rentals are available for purchase. Get your quote today by letting us know how many wireless headphones and silent headphone equipment you are looking to purchase here. After you fill out our website form, one of our team members will set up a 5-minute call to discuss the products you need to purchase and offer you a quote for your requested purchase items.

How do I get an upfront price for silent headphone rentals?
Get an upfront price for West Palm Beach silent headphone rentals by filling out our quote form or calling us today!

If I need to cancel my booking do you offer a full refund?
At SILENCE activations, we are here to support you in every way. Please give us a call if you no longer wish to bring your event to life with our silent disco headphone rentals. If you have ordered custom branded headsets or other specialty items, your order may be ineligible for refunds or returns once the purchase was finalized.

How do silent disco headphones work in West Palm Beach, FL?
Silent disco headphones are headsets where the music or speaker is broadcasted through wireless headphones instead of the traditional speaker system. Only people wearing the headphones can hear the music. Our SILENCE silent disco events use 3 different channels to project live or pre-recorded music, allowing party-goers to tune in to their favorite station and control their own volume. While our headphones are great for silent discos and club-like atmospheres, they’re also perfect for any other type of event! Anyone not wearing the silent headsets will still be able to hold a conversation at a normal volume, making silent headphone events in West Palm Beach, FL the perfect avenue for venues with noise constraints.
